items.title: Listen: Off the Ball with guests Grant Stott & JJ Bull
items.summary: The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: GB's Patten and partner Heliovaara beaten in French Open doubles final
items.summary: Great Britain's Henry Patten and Finnish partner Harri Heliovaara lose to Marcel Granollers and Horacio Zeballos in the French Open men's doubles final.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
